request.prompt: a settings section to permanently delete a repository

children.text: This action will permanently delete the repository and all associated data, including branches, commits, and issues. This cannot be undone.

components.title: Are you sure? Delete Repository?
components.description: This action will permanently delete the repository and all associated data, including branches, commits, and issues. This cannot be undone.
